title: Write-ahead log, checkpointing, and ARIES recovery
description: Implement WAL record types: Begin/Commit/Abort, InsertTuple/DeleteTuple/UpdateTuple (physiological with full undo data), IndexInsert/IndexDelete, PageAlloc/PageFree, CheckpointBegin/CheckpointEnd, CLR (compensation log records). Each WalEntry has: lsn (byte offset), prev_lsn (per-txn undo chain), record, crc32. Implement WAL manager: 64KB in-memory buffer, flush on commit/buffer-full/10ms timeout, group commit (multiple txns share single fsync), monotonic LSN assignment. Implement checkpointing: write CheckpointBegin with active txns, flush all dirty pages, write CheckpointEnd, truncate WAL before checkpoint LSN. Implement ARIES 3-phase recovery: Analysis (scan from last checkpoint, rebuild dirty page table + active txn table), Redo (forward scan, re-apply if page LSN < record LSN, idempotent), Undo (walk undo chains for uncommitted txns, write CLRs, CLRs never undone). Include tests: record serialization round-trip, CRC integrity, LSN monotonicity, flush correctness, group commit, redo/undo recovery scenarios, checkpoint recovery, crash simulation at various points.
result_summary:
All **57 tests pass** across all 8 test files. The WAL system is fully implemented and working:

**Source files** (all exist and compile):
- `sqld/src/wal/mod.rs` — module exports
- `sqld/src/wal/wal_record.rs` — 13 WAL record types with serialization/deserialization, WalEntry with LSN/prev_lsn/CRC32
- `sqld/src/wal/wal_manager.rs` — 64KB buffer, flush on commit/buffer-full/10ms timeout, group commit, monotonic LSN, truncation
- `sqld/src/wal/recovery.rs` — ARIES 3-phase recovery (Analysis/Redo/Undo), CLR generation, MemoryPageStore for testing
- `sqld/src/wal/checkpoint.rs` — fuzzy checkpointing with CheckpointBegin/End, dirty page flushing, WAL truncation

**Test files** (57 tests, all passing):
- `test_wal_write.rs` — 15 tests: record serialization round-trips, CRC integrity, LSN monotonicity, txn_id/affected_page correctness
- `test_wal_flush.rs` — 7 tests: flush semantics, commit triggers flush, group commit, buffer-full auto-flush, WAL reopen
- `test_wal_protocol.rs` — 7 tests: prev_lsn chains, interleaved txn chains, active txn tracking, parse_entries round-trip, torn write tolerance
- `test_recovery_redo.rs` — 5 tests: basic redo, idempotency, multiple pages, non-dirty page skipping, update redo
- `test_recovery_undo.rs` — 6 tests: uncommitted insert/delete/update undo, mixed committed/uncommitted, CLR generation, abort records
- `test_recovery_checkpoint.rs` — 6 tests: checkpoint begin/end records, checkpoint LSN persistence, truncation, recovery after checkpoint, active txn capture, analysis starting point
- `test_recovery_nested.rs` — 5 tests: multiple concurrent uncommitted txns, undo ordering, index operations, interleaved ops, already-aborted handling
- `test_crash_simulation.rs` — 6 tests: crash before/after commit flush, torn write recovery, crash mid-checkpoint, double recovery idempotency, mixed committed/uncommitted crash

Everything requested in the task specification is implemented and verified.
